name: Calico and Broad extended aging biology collaboration
summary: Calico and Broad Institute extended their partnership until September 2029, adding age-related neurodegeneration to ongoing aging biology and early-stage drug discovery work.
significance_note: Relevant as institutional aging-biology and translational infrastructure. It does not by itself change the evidence assessment for LEV-relevant interventions.

surface_routing.rationale: Material field infrastructure context that belongs in activity review, without changing evidence or outlook surfaces.
